summary: Audience recording with a pleasant high‑end sheen that highlights Brent's keyboard work.
review: The three reviewers all note a solid audience capture – described as very good sounding, though a bit bright in the high frequencies. The only performance comment is a brief nod to Brent’s playing, suggesting the keyboards stand out despite the lack of detailed set or song discussion.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are generally favorable (4‑5 stars) and praise the audio quality, with only minor criticism about high‑end harshness; limited show commentary keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear audience mix with a little too much high‑frequency emphasis; overall pleasant and listenable.

band_member_comments.Keys: Positive remark on Brent's keyboard performance.
